home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to travel with confidence
home.featuresSubtitle: Designed from day one for travelers with disabilities and family groups.
home.feature1Desc: Your personal travel assistant — knows your accessibility needs and every group member's profile. Available in English and Spanish, 24/7.
home.feature2Desc: Generates a complete itinerary tailored to every member's needs — mobility, vision, hearing, autism, and chronic conditions.
home.feature3Desc: Caribbean, LATAM, Europe, Asia, and the US. Each destination has a real accessibility rating, verified attractions, and specific tips per need type.
home.feature4Desc: Record your invisible needs, medications, and schedules. Everything is used to personalize every Alli and planner recommendation.
home.destinationsSubtitle: Handpicked for their real accessibility infrastructure and verified attractions.
home.ctaSubtitle: Free. No credit card. Ready in 2 minutes.

profile.title: My traveler profile
profile.subtitle: Your information helps us recommend 100% accessible destinations and services for you.

sections.chronicHint: List your conditions (e.g. fibromyalgia, POTS, type 1 diabetes).
sections.invisibleHint: What others can't see but matters when traveling. This helps Alli give you personalized recommendations.
sections.invisiblePlaceholder: E.g. I need to rest every 30 min, I can't tolerate loud noises, I need access to refrigeration for medications...
sections.medicationsHint: Times are adjusted to your timezone.
sections.groupHint: Add the people traveling with you.

chat.title: Alli 🌍
chat.subtitle: Your accessible travel assistant
chat.empty: Hi there! I'm Alli, your accessible travel assistant 🌍 How can I help you today?
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

destinations.title: Accessible destinations
destinations.subtitle: Caribbean & LATAM · Verified real accessibility
destinations.noResults: No destinations found with those filters.

planner.title: Trip Planner
planner.subtitle: Generate a personalized itinerary for your whole group, with accessibility at the center.
planner.groupHint: The plan will account for each person's accessibility needs.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noProfile: Complete your profile to see your accessibility summary.
dashboard.cardPlannerDesc: Generate personalized itineraries for your group
dashboard.cardCommunicationDesc: Useful phrases to show on screen
dashboard.tip0: Arrive at the airport at least 3 hours early if you need special assistance. Most airports offer mobility services with advance reservation.
dashboard.tip1: Research your hotel's accessibility features before booking. Request written confirmation of the accommodations you need.
dashboard.tip2: Download offline maps of your destination. In an emergency, you'll be able to navigate without internet access.
dashboard.tip3: Always carry your medications in your carry-on luggage, never in checked bags. Pack double the amount you need.
dashboard.tip4: Research whether your destination has adapted transportation apps. Many cities offer specific options for people with disabilities.
dashboard.tip5: Communicate your needs to the flight attendant when boarding. They can help with the boarding and disembarking process.
dashboard.tip6: Look for traveler groups with the same disability on social media. Their firsthand experiences are invaluable for planning your trip.

instalar.title: Install AllGo Travel
instalar.subtitle: Access AllGo from your home screen — no App Store needed
instalar.qrSubtitle: Point your camera at the QR code
instalar.stepsTitle: How to install on your device
instalar.iphoneStep1: 📲 Open the app in Safari (not Chrome)
instalar.iphoneStep2: Tap the Share button ⬆️ in Safari's toolbar
instalar.iphoneStep3: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
instalar.iphoneStep5: Done! The AllGo Travel icon will appear on your screen
instalar.androidStep2: Tap the 3 dots ⋮ in the top right
instalar.androidStep5: Done! The AllGo Travel icon will appear on your screen
instalar.benefit1Desc: Loads instantly like a native app

documentos.title: Travel Documents
documentos.subtitle: DOT forms and airline regulations for travelers with service animals
documentos.acaaDesc: The ACAA is the U.S. federal law that requires airlines to allow service animals on board at no extra charge. It applies to all flights operating in United States territory.
documentos.form1Title: DOT Service Animal Air Transportation Form
documentos.form1Desc: Required on flights over 8 hours or international flights on U.S. carriers.
documentos.form1WhenText: Flights over 8 hours or international on U.S. carriers
documentos.form1Note: The airline must provide it — also available at transportation.gov
documentos.form2Title: DOT Service Animal Relief Attestation Form
documentos.form2Desc: Required when the service animal cannot relieve itself in a sanitary manner during the flight.
documentos.form2WhenText: When your animal cannot wait for the full duration of the flight
documentos.form2Note: The airline must provide it — also available at transportation.gov
documentos.tipEs: Solicita los formularios 48 horas antes de tu vuelo
documentos.tipEn: Request forms 48 hours before your flight
documentos.airlineSubtitle: Visual reference of service animal policies by airline
documentos.countrySubtitle: Legal framework for service animals in popular destinations
